comment: ; Curve flattening demo: a G2 arc and a BSPLINE, flattened to G1 moves
; with --flatten-tolerance 0.1 (max deviation from the true curve, in path
; units). flatten_demo_raw.csv is the same program interpreted without
; flattening; flatten_demo_flattened.csv is the tol-0.1 result: only G1
; motions remain, the consumed I/J/PW columns are gone, and generated
; samples carry flattened=1 (programmed points stay unmarked).
